heading: Contact
description: Open to US remote roles and consulting conversations. Reach out if you want to talk through support operations, implementation workflows, or AI-assisted delivery.

guidance.title: What to send
guidance.description: A short note is enough. If it helps, this is usually the most useful context.
focusAreas: Support and success workflows ready for technical cleanup.
Implementation work that would benefit from a pragmatic delivery partner.
AI-assisted documentation, triage, or internal enablement systems.
briefingItems: The outcome you want to move toward.
Which systems, teams, or APIs are involved.
Any timing details that would be helpful to know.
guidance.timingNote: If timing matters, mention the date or deadline and I'll reply directly by email.

form.title: Send a message
form.description: Share a little context, the systems involved, and what you're aiming for. I'll reply directly.

hints.email: I reply to this address directly.
hints.message: Include context, timeline, and goals if possible.
hints.name: Use your full name for a faster follow-up.
hints.verification: Complete the verification check before sending.

form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
form.turnstileRequiredError: Please complete the verification check and try again.
form.turnstileUnavailableError: Verification is unavailable right now. Please try again later.
